title: Bitcoin faces fresh headwinds as China’s Kimi beats Claude, GPT in coding benchmark
summary: Moonshot's Kimi K3 took the top spot in frontend coding away from Claude and OpenAI, and it's free. Semiconductor stocks fell, and crypto fell with them.

title: AI frenzy losing steam leaves bitcoin less volatile than South Korean stocks
Live markets: Bitcoin slips to $63,000 as the chip rout goes global
summary: A deepening global selloff in chipmakers dragged risk assets lower, pulling bitcoin back from the $65,000 it reached on this week's soft inflation print.

title: Risk-off wave drags bitcoin below $63,000 as AI selloff spreads from stocks to crypto
summary: Crypto fell as AI stock fatigue and U.S.-Iran tensions weighed on sentiment, though a technical measure hints at oversold conditions heading into the weekend.

title: Airbnb CEO says X account was hacked, attacker posted AI-slop on tokenization
summary: Brian Chesky regained control of his account and told any new crypto followers he would be a "disappointing follow".
